Support a child

Your gift becomes
a child's future.

Give once, or monthly — every contribution funds education, learning materials, mentorship and protection for a young person ready to lead. 100% transparency, real impact.

Provides learning materials for a child for a full term.

Thank you for renewing a future.

Your one-time gift of ₦15,000 is on its way to work. We've sent a receipt to your email — and you'll hear how your support is changing lives.

See the impact
Full transparency

Where your money goes

Education & scholarships62%
Learning materials20%
Mentorship & skills12%
Operations6%

Why give to RECI

  • Every child is tracked from access to leadership
  • Transparent reporting on every naira and dollar
  • Cancel or change a monthly gift anytime
  • Local teams, deep community trust

Other ways to give

Prefer to give through your company, a bank transfer, or a legacy gift?

Talk to our team

Renewing minds, inspiring hope, and equipping young people to lead positive change across Nigeria and Africa.
